payload.answer: SQL execution is disabled in this environment (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false), so the query was not run.
citations: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false
payload.decision: Denied because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is false, so debug SQL access is disabled.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity lookup or durable memory update is appropriate for a blocked admin SQL request.

payload.intent: Attempt to run an administrative SQL query against the memory store.

details: Admin SQL request blocked due to disabled debug SQL setting.
No memory cards were read or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED before issuing admin SQL.
Use a supported non-admin memory inspection or search operation instead.
